description: Temporal pattern contract for detecting recurring behaviors, summarizing seasonality, and enriching downstream decisions with trend-cycle context.

detect.description: Detect recurring temporal structures such as cycles, seasonality, and repeated signal motifs from historical or streaming data.

summarize.description: Summarize detected patterns into interpretable temporal structure, recurrence, and significance signals.

enrich.description: Attach recurring-pattern and seasonality context to an existing decision, routing, or analytical payload.
